feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business Technology Platform
feed.subtitle: SAP Business Technology Platform Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Service Marketplace is missing
entry.content:
Hi, 

I've recently ran into an issue where my service marketplace is not showing on the sap cockpit trial account anymore. I've been using cockpit for about a year now always renewing the 90day trial but this is the first time I came into the issue. 
I have about 20days left of the trial and it just disappeared yesterday, I haven't changed my roles or anything. 
When I set up this trial account, I set it up for integration suite so I can learn CPI, I had the service market place since then but its just gone now?
I saw some people on the community with this issue and their resolution were role based but I can't figure it out even with adding and removing role collections, etc.

entry.title: How to develop an API-Endpoint with CAP?
entry.content:
I created a simple OData v.4 API with Node.js CAP. Let's call it simpleapi-srv.

If I open the application route for this api in the browser I get the following error message: 401 - Unauthorized.

I therefore created another application simpleapi based on the standalone app router. If I open the application route of this app I can login with my BTP user (and sucessfully work with the API). I understand by calling the app with the standalone app router the app router handles (with the help of the xsuaa) service the SAML / OAuth flow and ensures (via re-direction) the login process.

My question:
How can I provide an API-URL to an external partner and how do I grant him corresponding authorization? So e.g. he can use the API endpoint via postman or within his custom application development (outside BTP).

Does it make sense to create a service key for simpleapi and use the OAuth credentials from the key? How do I manage authorization (scopes and roles). I assume the CDS role defintion do not have any effect for the user in the service key....?

entry.title: Analytic privilige issue in Embedded SAC
entry.content:
We are using Live connection configuration based on HANA Analytics Adapter between Embedded SAC & our BTP (HANA Cloud DB). Connection is working fine and it is able to bring the data from source to target which is E-SAC in this case.

We want to enable row level authorization or Dynamic authorization based on user login in the reporting layer where we are using Analytic privileges in HANA calculation view with Dynamic restrictions based on Procedure.

Analytic Privilege is working fine as is expected to be however in E-SAC we found that reports are running based on DB runtime user rather than currently logged user. Eg: If I login in SAC then SAC should recognise my user ID which is Subash in this case however it is getting data based on runtime user or session user.

SAP HANA service for SAP BTP SAP Analytics Cloud

entry.title: Do we have a certificate for datasphere? thanks ~
entry.content:
Hi team,

In our available certificate list, I can't find any certificate is related to datasphere. So, do we have plan to onboard a new certificate for datasphere or please point me to a existing one.

Thanks

entry.title: Error while creating user with Identity Directory API in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are trying to create external user id using Identity Directory API action project in SAP Build Process Automation with IAS destination. we are executing the creates a user resource action within Automation where we are getting the below error :

The provided destination does not follow the expected structure. Please contact support.

Note : when are executing this action directly from connectors out of the automation we are able to create use id successfully.

Could you please Help or suggest any solution on this error, how we can resolve it.

Thanks,

Rupesh

entry.title: Build Work Zone Single logout (SLO) for a multitenant application does not work
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

We have a multitenant application, with a launchpad-module, deployed on a provider subaccount. When subscribing from a consumer’s subaccount, launchpad-module is returned as a dependency, so the consumer can access the launchpad. Also, for the consumer subaccount we have an IAS using OpenID Connect protocol, through which we can access the launchpad.

Due to a necessity of having UI5 and React applications together, we have created an SAP Build WorkZone launchpad, on consumer’s subaccount. In this new launchpad, we have added UI5 applications from multitenant application (Wee see our multitenant application as Content-Provider in Content Channels tab) and a React application.

The React application calls API “/users-api” to get the current user data. This call is made through multitenant router.

So, when we login the Build WorkZone launchpad, it looks like Single-Sign-On (SSO) is working fine, because we are getting access not only to the launchpad, but to the multitenant UI5 app and its data too, meaning that SSO is propagating to multitenant router.

The problem arrives while doing logout. Build WorkZone launchpad throws Single Logout (SLO) from IAS, but it looks like logout is not propagated to multitenant router, so, when we login again (With a different user) and call the “/users-api” we are getting the data from the previous user.

Is our approach wrong? There is a way to extend or override Build Work Zone standard logout process?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: CI/CD Credentials - Stage: release error
entry.content:
Hi community!
I am trying to connect my CI/CD to my github, which is also connected to my BAS. Once I push a change in BAS, I want the all of the stages to be automated in CI/CD, but im having an issue from the logs, related to some credentials or authorization.  Note that every stage, except the release stage is successful. In my config.yml file I have specified: cfCredentialsId: "deploy-to-cf", which I have used as a credential name in CI/CD, using basic authorization, where I am using my login details as email/password (is this wrong?). FYI, I am logged into Cloud foundry on BAS, but the way I logged into cloud foundry that way was by using a SSO Passcode, and not email/pw, so maybe I need to change the AUTH type in ci/cd to something else?
Thanks in advance for all help 🙂

entry.title: EPM_OIA_APPS not found
entry.content:
Hi,

I need to activate EPM_OIA_APPS which is a set of Fiori Demo apps and I do not know how to do it, does anyone please have a hint?

Regards

Mauricio

entry.title: how to dowland again my integrationsuite once i delete it in sap cpi
Dedicated instances in CAP project
entry.content:
Hi,
We have a CAP project in cloud foundry with multiple srv BTP instances in order to have better performances.
When we develop specific actions in service.js ( node.js to manage events), is it possible to have the code executed on some instances only ?

We would like to have instances dedicated to manage events from S4 and other to manage GUI of the application.

I could create a dedicated application to manage events to do that but could also be great to manage everything that concern one application in the same application.

Regards

entry.title: Integration with a GST Validation tool USING API IN SAP ABAP
entry.content: Please help regarding this requirement

entry.title: BTP service deletion stuck
entry.content:
Hi BTP Experts,

we currently have a running deletion process for the job-scheduler, which now runs for ~20 hours.

Is there anything I can do to restart/cancel this process? It seems to be stuck...

Thanks!
Nico

entry.title: How to reduce Quota for a Subaccount?
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have below query with ref to our CEPA global account. Requesting your inputs / guidance on the same.
Kindly let us know how to reduce the Quota for this sub-account. We are unable to reduce and it seems to have automatically assigned huge amounts of quota.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Custom HDM: Implementation BADI_HDM_CUSTOM_ENABLE examples
entry.content:
Good Morning,

I would like to use Custom Harmonized Document Management, in S4 2021 system, as documented in SAP Note 3253615.

As the Badi BADI_HDM_CUSTOM_ENABLE is not well documented and I am not ABAP developper, I am looking for implementation examples of this Badi.
If you you have implemented this badi, could you post your implementation?

Have a nice day.

entry.title: Transporting SAP Build Process Automation Projects
entry.content:
Hi,

Customer currently doesn't have SAP CTMS nor SAP Content Agent Service as part of current landscape and looking for whether or not to proceed with using SAP Build Process Automation and building solutions.

Referring to help.sap document contents - Is CTMS and Content Agent Service mandatory for transporting to another sub account BPA tenant (https://help.sap.com/docs/build-process-automation/sap-build-process-automation/promoting-projects) or manual via export to local system and import into Build Lobby (https://help.sap.com/docs/build-process-automation/sap-build-process-automation/manage-project-across-tenants) and deploy feasible as a manual transport mechanism without CTMS or Content Agent Service to higher environment tenants?


How about Action projects ? 

Pls advise.

 

Regards,

Vipin.

entry.title: Hiding rows in RDR1 - UDF
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I need some help with my query:
We have items with a sales part list. I would like to hide the components of the sales part in my documents.
I started to create a UDF which is saying Components yes/no -> query should aim to hide all the rows which are saying "yes"
Hope my question is clear.

entry.title: Empty Result Array Issue in Business Rules Service for Partner Creation Approval Process
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am encountering an issue while configuring the business partner creation approval live process. I am following the official configuration guide and am facing a challenge at the step where I need to enrich the base data using the My Inbox app.

Problem Description: After updating the data in My Inbox and attempting to submit it, the system sends a POST request to the following URL:

https://***process-automation.build.cloud.sap/BPManagement.comsapbpmEnrich/bpmrulesruntime/public/rule/runtime/rest/v2/rule-services

Although the request returns a status 200 (indicating that it has technically succeeded), the resulting data array is unexpectedly empty (Result: []). Here is the snippet of the code handling the response:

Questions:

1. Has anyone else experienced a similar issue with the My Inbox app in process automation environments?
2. Are there any known fixes or workarounds that can ensure the result array is not empty?

I appreciate any guidance or suggestions on how to resolve this. Thank you!

entry.title: Change field in Form SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hi Community!

Can I use the Forms in SAP Build Process Automation not only to approve but also change and add values?

The new value would be the output of the form.

Or is there any other function for that?

Basically, I want to give the user a chance to change the value, e.g. of the amount.

SAP Build SAP Build Process Automation SAP Business Technology Platform 

I guess its an easy one for you @Dan_Wroblewski

entry.title: BTP Apps, F4 Help and Personal Value Lists
entry.content:
We are currently working with a partner to create a BTP application to replace a transaction in SAP.

Many of our users - rely on the drop down lists and F4 help in SAP GUI to work quickly.   Most of these users have narrowed down their lists to SAP GUI personal value lists that only contain the 5 or 6 items they care about in their line of business.

Is there a way to extend these Personal Value Lists to the BTP app from SAP GUI so users don't have to scroll through an entire list of choices?

entry.title: BTP Apps & Saving Outputs to Local Network Storage
entry.content:
We are working on a BTP apps that generates sales orders in SAP.    Once a sales order is approved - our standard SAP system createes an output PDF - confirmation.   

Normally our users will review these PDF confirmations, then email them to the customer, then save a copy to our shared network drive.

I would like to automate this process in our BTP app if possible - so once the output is generated in SAP it is automatically saved in the correct folder on this drive with the correct file name.

Any ideas?
